calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Relief From Claim Requirement [Gov. Code Sec. 946.6]
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARRIANNE B. SIOSON OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BRIAN L. LARSEN, TEL. NO. 1-415-398-5000 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. BRIAN PAUL CEBALLO, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-554-3911 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ANA FERNANDEZ' Motion For Relief From Claim Requirement [Gov. Code Sec. 946.6] is DENIED. Plaintiff's explanation that failure to timely file a claim against CCSF was because of a calendaring error is inadequate and does not rise to excusable neglect. There is no showing of reasonable diligence. Plaintiff's counsel states that he was retained on July 1, 2014. Given that he was retained and not merely considering if he would take the case or not, he fails to explain why calendaring was even necessary as opposed to promptly filing. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
